PM OpEx | Intraday post (16/Jan)

Weekly post:

January OpEx week quant breakdown | Weekly post (12-16/Jan) - FREE

Last weekly post upside target was hit.

The weekly post is entirely free. It contains the key levels, and expected dynamics and my derivation of sentiment from the vol markets.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile is quite balanced, slightly negative. Customers are selling vol into both direction, but slightly more vol is sold to the downside. Upside vvol is also sold. Rangebound, no clear trend. Stability anyway.

Centroid is at 6950.91

Upside pivot is 6973.28target is 6999.03This target is very sticky locally with margin of error of 7010

Downside pivot is at 6941.05with target of 6891.53Sticky after 1.30PM, but ‘reversionish’ before.Pivot is also sticky if 6920 can be held.

I mark 6978/80 line, functionates as a line-in-the sand today into the PM session providing reversion opportunities. It’s a make it or break it line in the first 2 hours. After the opening, we can expect some pressure around 6960. Then we will see how customers react.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
